summary: Project Profile is now the project-level source of truth under .opennori/profile, while current goals only store profile_evidence compliance. profile add/show/check work without requiring a current goal; profile evidence and profile check --record write current-goal compliance evidence. status/report/check/dashboard compute completion risk from Project Profile plus the current goal ledger without embedding Profile items in Product AC or contract JSON.

sources.label: opennori-self-ac-o-8-project-profile-scope
sources.summary: Architecture Baseline alignment context. This is not Product AC evidence by itself.

reviewability: Inspect the listed source files and docs. Run profile add/show/check in an empty temp project to confirm Project Profile can exist without a current goal; run profile evidence or check --record with a current goal to confirm only profile_evidence is written to that goal ledger; rerun the listed typecheck/tests/check.
limitations: This proves OpenNori state semantics and command behavior. It does not prove every future agent will describe Profile perfectly; packaged Skills and user review still carry that language boundary.
